agency.name: GF Innovative Solutions
agency.tagline: AI-led marketing operations for ambitious brands

headline: Summer Strength: turn the July dip into our biggest brand moment of the year
positioningStatement: Q3 is about turning summer's motivational dip into our biggest brand moment of the year - anchored by the Summer Strength Challenge in August.
strategy: Warm July with authority-building education, sell the Summer Strength Challenge through August, then convert challenge graduates into annual members in September while quietly opening the corporate-wellness LinkedIn pipeline.

strategicPriorities.label: Authority
strategicPriorities.description: Establish FitVibe as the credible voice on strength + recovery - not another wellness influencer.

strategicPriorities.label: Launch
strategicPriorities.description: Make the Summer Strength Challenge the centerpiece. Build to it in July, sell it in August.

strategicPriorities.label: Community
strategicPriorities.description: Surface member stories - let users see themselves in the brand. UGC > studio shots.

strategicPriorities.label: B2B pipeline
strategicPriorities.description: Open the corporate wellness channel on LinkedIn. Quiet first, ramp in September.

pillars.name: Education
pillars.description: Workout science, nutrition myth-busting, recovery tips. Builds authority and earns saves.

pillars.name: Community
pillars.description: Member spotlights, transformation stories, UGC reposts. Drives shares and trust.

pillars.name: Promotional
pillars.description: Class launches, membership offers, challenge sign-ups. Conversion-focused - used sparingly to avoid fatigue.

pillars.name: Brand & Lifestyle
pillars.description: Coach culture, studio aesthetic, behind-the-scenes. Builds emotional connection and brand recall.

monthlyFocus.intent: Establish authority before the August push. Front-load education and coach intros. Quiet on promotion.
priorities: Tease the Summer Strength Challenge in final week
monthlyFocus.watch: Save rate on educational Reels - this becomes our baseline for the year.

monthlyFocus.intent: All channels coordinate around the Summer Strength Challenge. Launch Aug 1, hard-sell window Aug 1-14, soft-sell + UGC Aug 15-31.
priorities: Founder LinkedIn on corporate wellness angle
monthlyFocus.watch: Challenge sign-ups, but more importantly: which channel sourced them. This decides Q4 budget split.

monthlyFocus.intent: Challenge graduates -> annual members. September is historically our top sign-up month - capitalize.
monthlyFocus.watch: Member retention 30 days post-challenge. Inbound HR DMs on LinkedIn (B2B pipeline indicator).

keyDates.title: Independence Day (US)
keyDates.angle: 'Freedom' framing - break from the chair, get outside. Bodyweight outdoor circuit Reel.

keyDates.title: IDEA World Fitness Convention
keyDates.angle: Coach Lena attending - BTS Stories + LinkedIn post on what's actually new in the industry.

keyDates.title: Mid-summer motivation slump
keyDates.angle: Strongest content moment of July. 'You're not lazy, you're hot' - empathetic educational post on training in heat.

keyDates.title: Summer Strength Challenge launch
keyDates.angle: Owned moment. Coordinated push across IG + LinkedIn + TikTok same day. Founder LinkedIn post + IG Reel + TikTok teaser.

keyDates.title: International Day of Friendship
keyDates.angle: Soft tie-in to cohort/community pillar - 'bring a friend' challenge promo. Skip if calendar gets crowded.

keyDates.title: Women's Equality Day (US)
keyDates.angle: Our primary audience is 60% women. Coach Lena's story angle - strength training as reclamation. LinkedIn long-form.

keyDates.title: Labor Day (US)
keyDates.angle: End-of-summer hinge. 'Back to routine' framing - perfect lead-in for September challenge graduation content.

keyDates.title: World Suicide Prevention Day
keyDates.angle: Handle with care. Movement-and-mental-health angle only - partner with a licensed therapist for a co-post. No flippant takes.

keyDates.title: Back-to-routine season
keyDates.angle: September is our highest sign-up month historically. Membership campaign window opens. Educational 'how to actually stick to it this time' carousel.

keyDates.title: First day of autumn
keyDates.angle: Bridge into Q4 strength-block planning. Tease October programming.

platforms.name: Instagram
platforms.rationale: Highest overlap with our 30-45 return-to-fitness target. Save-driven educational content performs. Reels surface to lookalikes; Carousels drive saves and shares.

platforms.name: LinkedIn
platforms.role: Secondary - B2B corporate wellness pipeline + founder voice
platforms.rationale: HR and People Ops decision-makers live here during work hours. Founder thought leadership opens cold-outbound doors. Lower volume, higher contract value.

platforms.name: TikTok
platforms.role: Experimental - younger demo, format-market fit test
platforms.rationale: Cheap reach into the 22-30 cohort. We treat Q3 as a learning quarter: if creator-style content lands, scale in Q4. If not, redeploy budget to IG.
